name: Moley Miner
author: Poki
description: Moley Miner is a mining simulator where you play as the charming little Moley, digging through the earth to find rare materials and fossils. Fill up your backpack with all kinds of goods, and sell them once you come back up. Make sure to keep an eye on your battery though, as you don’t want it to drain! Luckily, you can upgrade your battery to last longer, as well as improve your drill, backpack, and even look! What will you find hidden down in the dirt? How to play Moley Miner? Swipe, drag, or use WASD/arrow keys to move Moley around. Who created Moley Miner? Moley Miner is created by Basurita Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Moley Miner for free? You can play Moley Miner for free on Poki. Can I play Moley Miner on mobile devices and desktop? Moley Miner can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
